Citigroup hires two senior JPMorgan bankers to boost investment banking Investing.com -- Citigroup Inc (NYSE:C). is hiring two senior bankers from JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) to strengthen its investment banking division, according to a Bloomberg report on Wednesday.

Sees expenses approximately $53.4B, subject to volume and other revenue-related expenses. Sees Branded Cards NCL range: 3.50%-4.00%; Retail Services NCL range: 5.75%-6.25%. Says ACL will be a function of macroeconomic environment and business volume. Says Board of Directors authorized a $20B common share repurchase program in January.
